calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants JWH Engineering, LLC or Concentric Project Controllers, Inc.
Defaults entered against defendants on March 17, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 17, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants: JWH Engineering, LLC and Concentric Project Controllers, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $54,435.07.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,758.35.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total of $60,158.42.

Additionally, plaintiff Bank of the West is deemend the owner of the leased equipment described in Exhibit A of the judgment, and is entitled to immediate possession of said equipment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Continued To Jun-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
